summary: Comprehensive testing of Editorial Calendar module (Calendrier Éditorial). All 22 backend tests PASSED. Frontend testing confirmed: Calendar view, Trello view with weekly columns, Key dates display, Post creation from key dates, Social preview mockups (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube), Filters (network, status, format), and Move API. Fixed minor bug with None time in calendar view.

minor.issue: When scheduled_time was None, calendar view showed 'TNone:00' instead of default time
minor.fix_applied: Changed time_str = post.get('scheduled_time', '09:00') to time_str = post.get('scheduled_time') or '09:00'

critical_code_review_comments: EditorialCalendarPage.jsx is 1809 lines - consider splitting into smaller components (CalendarView, TrelloView, PostModal, etc.)
Only 1 data-testid found in EditorialCalendarPage.jsx - add more for better test automation
SocialPreviewModal.jsx has no data-testid attributes - add for testing social preview tabs
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Editorial_Calendar (beaute niche) and TEST_Automobile_Calendar during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editorial Calendar module fully tested. Key features: AI-generated key dates (20-25 dates per calendar based on niche/country), Social preview mockups for 5 platforms, Trello view with weekly columns, drag-drop via move API. Login URL is /admin/login, Editorial Calendar is at /admin/editorial.

verified_features.list_calendars: PASS - Returns calendars with post_count and key_dates
verified_features.create_calendar_with_key_dates: PASS - AI generates 20-25 key dates based on niche
verified_features.get_calendar_key_dates: PASS - Returns key dates with date, title, category, icon, content_angle
verified_features.create_post_from_key_date: PASS - Creates post pre-filled with key date info
verified_features.list_posts: PASS - Returns posts with calendar info
verified_features.create_post: PASS - Creates post with networks, format, pillar, objective
verified_features.move_post: PASS - Moves post to new date/time (drag-drop support)
verified_features.calendar_view: PASS - Returns events formatted for calendar display
verified_features.frontend_calendar_view: PASS - Calendar displays posts and key dates
verified_features.frontend_trello_view: PASS - Weekly columns with draggable post cards
verified_features.frontend_filters: PASS - Network, status, format dropdowns work
verified_features.frontend_new_calendar_modal: PASS - Shows niche/country selection with AI key dates option
verified_features.frontend_new_post_modal: PASS - Shows all fields including AI assist button
verified_features.frontend_social_preview: PASS - Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube mockups

frontend_screenshots.editorial_calendar_page: Calendar view with posts and key dates displayed
frontend_screenshots.trello_view: Weekly columns (29-4 janv, 5-11 janv, etc.) with draggable cards

frontend_screenshots.new_post_modal: Shows content/planning/media tabs with all fields
